auth.name: Name (optional)
auth.errorAccessDenied: Access denied. Your account is not authorized.
auth.errorSignInFailed: Sign in failed. Please try again.

chat.welcome: What can I help you with?
chat.errorSending: An error occurred while sending the message. Please try again.
chat.errorApiKeyInvalid: API key is invalid. Please set the correct key in "API Key" settings in the sidebar.
chat.errorApiKeyMissing: {provider} API key is not configured. Please set the key in "API Key" settings in the sidebar.

sidebar.deleteConfirm: Delete this session? This action cannot be undone.

apiKey.title: API Key Settings
apiKey.description: Set API keys for each provider. Keys are stored only in your browser's localStorage.
apiKey.googleFreeNote: Google models can be used without an API key (Free). x2, x10 indicate free tier usage multiplier. Set your own key for higher limits.

systemPrompt.title: System Prompt
systemPrompt.description: Set instructions that the AI will follow. This affects the tone and behavior of all responses.
systemPrompt.globalPlaceholder: e.g. Always respond in formal Japanese...
systemPrompt.sessionPlaceholder: e.g. You are a travel planning expert...

context.title: Context Memory
context.description: Facts the AI remembers about you. These are automatically extracted from conversations, and you can also add or edit them manually.
context.emptyMessage: Nothing registered yet. Add from the form above, or continue chatting and the AI will learn automatically.
